title: Looking for Teacher at WhiteHat Jr Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Looking for Teacher at WhiteHat Jr Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Teacher looking for your next big career move? WhiteHat Jr Consulting Pvt Ltd in Visakhapatnam offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About WhiteHat Jr Consulting Pvt Ltd:
WhiteHat Jr Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Support students with special educational needs
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in MS Office

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with WhiteHat Jr Consulting Pvt Ltd!
